heading: Lump sum allowance for Speaker
label: 5124 Lump sum allowance for Speaker
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 74a–12 of this titleSection is from the Congressional Operations Appropriations Act, 2002, which is title I of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2002.

children.label: a
children.text: The aggregate amount otherwise authorized to be appropriated for a fiscal year for the lump-sum allowance for the Office of the Speaker of the House of Representatives shall be increased by $40,000.

children.label: b
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2002 and each succeeding fiscal year.
